verdict_reason: Tags on BG 2.7 are decision-paralysis, judgment-under-uncertainty, team-culture. The decision-paralysis and judgment-under-uncertainty tags overlap with BG 2.6 (which uses both) — and the doctrines are coherent: 2.6 names the bottom of honest reasoning inside a broken frame (decision-paralysis as the diagnostic state), and 2.7 names the unlock-protocol when that state has been reached (judgment-under-uncertainty resolved by request-form change). These do not contradict. The team-culture tag is the verse's own contribution and may need to be checked against later verses at corpus-completion time. No cross_references[] declared, so cross-reference integrity is not applicable. PASS.
